acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Code will not compile for Java 21 features if source/target remain at 17.

acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the Maven compiler plugin to enforce Java 21 compilation.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit release flag, the compiler might not strictly enforce API compatibility with Java 21.

acceptance-test/src/main/java/io/quarkus.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
